name: Pack Of 22: Bonnie Adult Cat Food Pouch - Liver Chunks in Jelly 85g
description: Bonnie Adult Cat Food Pouch -Liver Chunks in Jelly (Pack of 22) , fully balanced, lamb and liver protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 8.5 Crude Oils & Fats (%) - 4,5 Crude Fiber (%) -0.3 Moisture (%) -83 Crude Ash (%) - 2.5 Vitamin E (Min) - 15 mg/kg Vitamin D3 (Min) - 250 IU/kg Copper -1 mg/kg Manganese -1 mg/kg Zinc - 15 mg/kg Biotin - 20 g/kg Taurine - 445 mg/kg INGREDIENTS: Meat & Animal Derivatives (liver 5%), minerals, inulin (0.1%).
